name: agent-factory
description: Run and schedule AI coding agents in isolated git worktrees with the Agent Factory (af) CLI

interface.shortDescription: Run and schedule coding agents in isolated git worktrees
interface.longDescription: Agent Factory (af) runs each AI coding agent in its own git worktree and tmux session. This plugin teaches Codex to drive the af CLI — create and prompt sessions, watch and preview their output, and schedule recurring tasks — and checks at session start whether af is installed. It does not install af.
defaultPrompt: Start an af session that fixes the failing test in this repo.
List my af sessions and preview the one that looks stuck.
Schedule an af task to triage new issues every morning.
